message:
🌱 istio: Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when using SSL (#1143)

* 🌱 Add istio: Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct istio namespace to istio-system

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-7964-istio-give-x-forwarded-proto-http-to-upstream-server-when-using-ssl-t",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when using SSL termination",
+    "description": "Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when using SSL termination. Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current istio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your istio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nhelm list -n istio-system 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working istio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\nIstio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when using SSL termination.\n\nIstio give `x-forwarded-proto=https`\n\n1. Deploy a nginx with SSL termination on a domain, change `<your domain name>`, [config file][1]\n1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when…",
+        "description": "I think this can done with some combination of https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/pull/7995 and https://github.com/istio/istio/wiki/EnvoyFilter-Samples#use-remote-address-and-xff-num-trust-hops if someone has a chance to try it out\n```yaml\n...\n   Request Headers:\n\tx-forwarded-port=80\n\tx-forwarded-proto=http\n   ...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I think this can done with some combination of https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/pull/7995 and https://github.com/istio/istio/wiki/EnvoyFilter-Samples#use-remote-address-and-xff-num-trust-hops if someone has a chance to try it out",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "...\n   Request Headers:\n\tx-forwarded-port=80\n\tx-forwarded-proto=http\n   ...",
+        "...\n   Request Headers:\n\tx-forwarded-port=443\n\tx-forwarded-proto=http\n   ...",
+        "$ istioctl version\nVersion: 1.0.0\nGitRevision: 3a136c90ec5e308f236e0d7ebb5c4c5e405217f4\nUser: root@71a9470ea93c\nHub: gcr.io/istio-release\nGolangVersion: go1.10.1\nBuildStatus: Clean\n\n$ kubectl version --short\nClient Version: v1.11.2\nServer Version: v1.11.1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
